narrative:
North Canton 4-B (precinct in Stark County) has 1,005 registered voters, with 52.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.3%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.2 percentage points.
